---
title: "Blog Posts"
listing: 
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: "default"
---

My goal for the spring semester is to publish some blog posts here on my personal website. Stay posted for what's to come!

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 40px; background-color: #e0f2fe; border-radius: 10px; margin: 20px 0;">
  <h2 style="color:#1e3a8a;">🚧 Blog Section In Progress 🚧</h2>
  <p style="font-size: 1.1em; color:#1e40af;">
    This section is under construction — check back soon for upcoming posts!
  </p>
</div>

---

<div style="text-align: center; font-style: italic; margin-top: 40px;">
  <strong>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bowen-de-gouw" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> ·
    <a href="https://github.com/bdegouw" target="_blank">GitHub</a> ·
    <a href="mailto:bdegouw@bu.edu">Email</a>
  </strong>
</div>
